name: Lake Shore Gold Corp.
description: Lake Shore Gold Corp. was a Canadian-based mining company primarily engaged in the exploration, development, and operation of gold properties in Northern Ontario. The company focused on its Timmins West and Bell Creek mining complexes, which are located in the prolific Timmins gold camp. Following its acquisition in 2016, Lake Shore Gold now operates as a key subsidiary of Pan American Silver Corp., continuing to contribute to gold production in the region through its established underground mining and processing facilities in Ontario.
